summary: Comprehensive testing of Anima Fund autonomous VC platform - all backend APIs working (38/38 tests passed), frontend fully functional with Engine Running status, wallet/QR display, live console logs, and dashboard navigation.

issues: Shows 'Engine not running' message in center despite ENGINE ACTIVE status - minor UX inconsistency due to engine_live being false (turn_count=0). Engine IS running but sleeping without completed turns.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider updating Agent Mind center message to reflect 'Engine sleeping (awaiting funding)' instead of 'Engine not running' when engine_running=true but engine_live=false
critical_code_review_comments: All required API endpoints working correctly per specification
Engine state.db exists and is being read properly by engine_bridge.py
Frontend properly displays wallet address, QR code, live logs, and dashboard
ENGINE ACTIVE header displays correctly when db_exists=true
Previous bug fixes (iteration_6) for button disable, state persistence, and header status are all working
test_credentials: None required - engine generates its own wallet
seed_data_creation: Engine was already running from previous test iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features working. Engine is in 'sleeping' state due to 'Insufficient credits' (0 cents). This is expected behavior per problem statement. The state.db exists at ~/.anima/state.db and contains identity data. Wallet address: 0xa150c2A363E97FAa9aa09c87c38bfE0705C15206. All API endpoints tested and verified.

verified_features.GET /api/live/activity: ✓ Returns empty activity list (no turns completed)
verified_features.GET /api/engine/logs: ✓ Returns stdout/stderr logs and anima_dir file list
verified_features.Frontend Genesis Page: ✓ Shows Engine Running, wallet, QR, live console
verified_features.Frontend Dashboard: ✓ Opens when clicking button, shows ENGINE ACTIVE header
